prompt: think through and scope this feature before implementation

prompt: run a no skips code health audit on the whole repo

prompt: run the full registered deep audit with production readiness and performance categories

name: documentation health prompt routes etrnl-documentation-health
prompt: run a documentation health audit for docs drift, stale READMEs, ADR health, and TSDoc coverage

name: commit prompt routes etrnl-commit
prompt: commit the verified changes after checking the diff

name: context restore prompt routes etrnl-context-restore
prompt: restore context from the saved handover and resume the work

prompt: write a handover prompt so I can start a fresh session

name: dependency prompt routes etrnl-deps
prompt: upgrade this package and run the dependency audit

prompt: free SSD space with a disk cleanup pass

prompt: check this VIVAZ email reply for bad Brazilian Portuguese, em dashes, and AI tells

name: execute prompt routes etrnl-execute
prompt: implement the approved plan now

name: fix issue prompt routes etrnl-fix-issue
prompt: reproduce and fix issue #123

name: parallel prompt routes etrnl-parallel
prompt: fan out the independent checks to multiple agents

name: performance audit prompt routes etrnl-performance-audit
prompt: audit route latency, cold and warm performance, bundle size, React rendering, and infrastructure speed

name: speed audit prompt routes etrnl-performance-audit
prompt: run a speed audit and latency audit for this app

name: plan prompt routes etrnl-plan
prompt: write a detailed implementation plan for this repo

name: production readiness prompt routes etrnl-production-readiness
prompt: audit production readiness for validation, auth edge cases, webhooks, tenancy, migrations, env, and error boundaries

name: webhook reliability prompt routes etrnl-production-readiness
prompt: audit webhook reliability and webhook safety for duplicate delivery

name: pr prompt routes etrnl-pr
prompt: prepare a pull request with verification evidence

prompt: run browser QA on the changed routes and check console and network

name: review prompt routes etrnl-review
prompt: do a final review pass for loose ends

name: stress prompt routes etrnl-stress-test
prompt: stress test this rollout and list failure modes

name: test prompt routes etrnl-test
prompt: run tests and fix test failures

prompt: what changed here?
